repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform_v1 banked note: population variance maps coincide at truth with identical Riesz-direction derivatives / first-order equivalence

published_prior_art.cite: Newey1994Econometrica: same canonical gradient forces same first-order semiparametric variance

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform_v1: same rho_star-style weak-overlap DML-LRO-ADML studentization frontier, rejected because population variance maps/report derivatives collapsed

published_prior_art.cite: none; closest verified papers give DML/LRO/ADML validity, Riesz robustness, calibration, or weak-overlap DR inference, not a three-report iff frontier
finite-support matrix auditability is routine once exact report functionals are specified; no verified DML/LRO/ADML paper gives the proposed common audit table
ChernozhukovEscancianoIchimuraNeweyRobins2022LRO + ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022ADML do not classify ATE-specialized LRO normalizations by ADML report-certificate equivalence

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The no-go theorem is already the banked v1 lesson: the common-EIF/population-variance route collapses to first-order equivalence, so it should be framed only as a guardrail, not as a novel result.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The weak-overlap axis misses closer published comparators: Rothe2017LimitedOverlapCI, HongLeungLi2020, HeilerKazak2021ExtremePS, and MaSantAnnaSasakiUra2026WeakOverlapDR should be compared explicitly.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: rho_star is not well pinned: lambda_min(K_n) depends on the chosen basis/scaling and log(1+lambda_min) cannot distinguish shrinking weak-overlap eigenvalues from fixed-overlap bounded eigenvalues.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The exact DML, LRO, and ADML published variance reports are named but not mathematically defined; without their summands, Gamma_mell,n and the iff report frontier are not definite objects.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 2
soundness_flags.one_line: Finite-support auditability asserts entries depend only on cell probabilities, propensities, means, and residual second moments, but the report maps and LRO/ADML normalization choices are not specified enough to justify that list.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The 'ATE-specialized LRO moment and Jacobian normalization' equivalence class is not parameterized, so the iff statement has no fixed domain of normalizations.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Assumption spectral already assumes positive-cone ordering and strict directions for the pairwise report gaps, which overlaps with the advertised strict ADML < LRO < DML conclusion.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace Assumption reports with explicit DML, LRO, and ADML variance-report summands under the locked ATE normalization, including the exact LRO moment/Jacobian convention.
Redefine rho_star using a scale-invariant spectral quantity, such as a generalized eigenvalue or normalized Rayleigh quotient, and show the fixed-overlap and weak-overlap limits separately.
Add a Related-work paragraph comparing the conjecture to Rothe 2017, Hong-Leung-Li 2020, Heiler-Kazak 2021, and Ma-Sant'Anna-Sasaki-Ura 2026, stating why none subsumes the three-report frontier.
Downgrade Theorem 1's novelty language to a guardrail/corollary and make Conjecture 1 the sole flagship kernel.

recommended_next_step: Patch the exact report definitions and spectral normalization first; the flagship novelty survives only if those objects become invariant, auditable mathematical objects.
